mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(WORK_YMD, 'YYYYMMDD') AS WORK_YMD , USER_ID , WORK_BGNG_DT , WORK_END_DT , WORK_HR , LATE_YN , EARLY_YN , OVERTIME_YN , OVERTIME_HR FROM TIME_AND_ATTENDANCE

SELECT TO_CHAR(WORK_YMD, 'YYYYMMDD') AS WORK_YMD , USER_ID , WORK_BGNG_DT , WORK_END_DT , WORK_HR , LATE_YN , EARLY_YN , OVERTIME_YN , OVERTIME_HR FROM TIME_AND_ATTENDANCE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY WORK_YMD DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(WORK_YMD, 'YYYYMMDD') AS WORK_YMD , USER_ID , WORK_BGNG_DT , WORK_END_DT , WORK_HR , LATE_YN , EARLY_YN , OVERTIME_YN , OVERTIME_HR FROM TIME_AND_ATTENDANCE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND TO_CHAR(WORK_YMD, 'YYYYMMDD') = #{workYmd}
